title.en: China-to-Hungary Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入匈牙利：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入匈牙利：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Hungary (MSZT/MEKH/MAVIR) expectations: MSZT-adopted standards routes, MEKH and MAVIR grid-connection processes, CE-marking-aligned requirements, IEC 62109, IEC 62116, IEC 61727, IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 evidence, with 230/400 V 50 Hz grid settings and landlocked import logistics via Koper/Rijeka/Hamburg — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与匈牙利（MSZT/MEKH/MAVIR）要求的对照，包括MSZT采用路径、MEKH/MAVIR并网审查、EU CE一致性证据、IEC 62109、IEC 62116、防孤岛和IEC 62920 / IEC 61000证据；并考虑230/400 V、50 Hz电网与经科佩尔/里耶卡/汉堡的内陆入境物流，与中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准比较。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與匈牙利（MSZT/MEKH/MAVIR）要求的對照，包括MSZT採用路徑、MEKH/MAVIR併網審查、EU CE一致性證據、IEC 62109、IEC 62116、防孤島和IEC 62920 / IEC 61000證據；並考慮230/400 V、50 Hz電網與經科佩爾/里耶卡/漢堡的內陸入境物流，與中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準比較。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, standards determination, grid-operator approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current Hungary (MSZT/MEKH/MAVIR) requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、标准裁定、并网审批、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行匈牙利（MSZT/MEKH/MAVIR）要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、標準裁定、併網核准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行匈牙利（MSZT/MEKH/MAVIR）要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Hungary, practical gaps are: confirm the applicable MSZT route and project-level approval path through MEKH and MAVIR; validate that IEC 62109-1/-2 safety testing, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, and IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC documentation are accepted for Hungarian installations; and prove 230/400 V 50 Hz performance, protection thresholds, and reconnection timing per MAVIR grid-code requirements. Hungary is landlocked — import logistics run via Koper (Slovenia), Rijeka (Croatia), or Hamburg (Germany). Hungarian-language documentation is often required for local approval. China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 documents are useful background but are not automatically interchangeable with Hungary/EU evidence.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口匈牙利时，主要差距包括：确认MSZT适用路径以及通过MEKH和MAVIR的项目级审批流程；核实IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727并网接口和IEC 62920/IEC 61000 EMC证据是否被匈牙利项目接受；并依据MAVIR电网规程验证230/400 V 50 Hz下的保护阈值和重连延迟。匈牙利为内陆国——进口物流经科佩尔（斯洛文尼亚）、里耶卡（克罗地亚）或汉堡（德国）港口。当地审批通常需要匈牙利语文件。中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004与GB/T 19964证据可作为背景参考，但不能自动替代匈牙利/欧盟证据。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口匈牙利時，主要差距包括：確認MSZT適用路徑以及通過MEKH和MAVIR的專案級審批流程；核實IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727併網介面和IEC 62920/IEC 61000 EMC證據是否被匈牙利專案接受；並依據MAVIR電網規程驗證230/400 V 50 Hz下的保護閾值和重連延遲。匈牙利為內陸國——進口物流經科佩爾（斯洛文尼亞）、里耶卡（克羅埃西亞）或漢堡（德國）港口。當地審批通常需要匈牙利語文件。中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004與GB/T 19964證據可作為背景參考，但不能自動替代匈牙利/歐盟證據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
